text_original: This is a character driven AI role play scenario service. Can quick start from some presets or create your own. At it's core that seems fine. The interaction I could see being useful for brainstorming. As for the app's business model I have no idea. There is a subscription service and coins can be earned... none of which is explained AT ALL! Dev also has 6 AI chat service apps, all with apparently identical function. It's all very confusing.
text_zh: 这是一款以角色驱动的AI角色扮演情景服务，可以快速从一些预设选项开始，或创建自己的情景。其核心功能看起来没问题，我能看到这种互动在头脑风暴中可能有用。至于应用的商业模式，我完全不清楚。存在订阅服务，积分可以通过...获得，但这一切完全没有解释！开发者还有六个AI聊天服务应用，功能似乎完全相同。这一切非常令人困惑。
reply_original: Hi there! Thank you for your feedback. We truly value your input! Our subscription model offers VIP benefits like unlimited chats and memory features, while coins can be earned through tasks. For detailed info, please reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Your questions will help us improve!
reply_zh: 你好！感谢您的反馈。我们非常重视您的意见！我们的订阅模式提供VIP权益，如无限次聊天和记忆功能，同时金币可以通过完成任务获得。如需详细了解，请联系support@fantachat.ai。您的问题将帮助我们不断改进！
